UNIFI_LOCAL_HOST.description: IP or hostname of UniFi local gateway (e.g., 192.168.1.1)

UNIFI_LOCAL_KEY.description: API key for the UniFi Local Gateway API

UNIFI_API_KEY.description: API key for Cloud V1 and Site Manager EA (optional, for multi-site)

UNIFI_WRITE_ENABLED.description: Set to "true" to enable write operations (default: false)
